_comment: User-tunable experiment parameters. No value is hardcoded in experiment_controller.py — every threshold and window boundary comes from this file.
_experiment_mode_comment: disciplined_live_experiment: requires exact Strategy Tester date-window support (ADR-0010 — blocked on Free tier). preset_smoke_test: allows preset windows for plumbing verification only, NOT ADR-0010 compliant.

tradingview_tier._comment: Constraints mirror TradingView plan limits. Adjust if you upgrade.
